current_plan.description: Build topical authority in AI x Finance Operations through twice-daily publishing targeting high-intent finance executives; monitor Bing crawl ramp-up and GSC indexing to unlock first performance data by evaluation date.
long_tail_keywords: how AI is changing investment banking 2026
current_plan.rationale: Strategy launched 2026-03-22 — only 2 days old, well within the 5-day minimum evaluation window. GA4 shows only 2 sessions (direct + referral, no organic), zero GSC data, and zero Bing query/page data, all consistent with a brand-new site in crawl ramp-up. Bing crawl stats show healthy progression (0→1→2→3→5 pages/day) with only one transient error now resolved, confirming bot activity is ramping normally. No performance signal exists to justify ADJUST or NEW.

decision_history.rationale: The strategy launched 2026-03-22, making it only 1 day old — well within the 5-day minimum evaluation window. GA4 and GSC data are unavailable due to a misconfigured IAM credentials API (503/403 errors), so no performance data can be assessed. Google Trends also returned a 404. Tavily confirms strong competitor activity in AI-in-finance content, validating the chosen pillar. Strategy must be held until instrumentation is restored and real data flows.

decision_history.rationale: Strategy launched 2026-03-22 — only 2 days old, well within the 5-day minimum evaluation window. GA4 property ID error (G-PQGD25NQ79 requires numeric ID) and GSC 403 permission error persist, yielding zero performance data. Bing shows no query or page data yet, consistent with a brand-new site. Google Trends returned 404 again. Tavily confirms the AI-in-finance-operations pillar remains highly competitive and well-trafficked by Finastra, InData Labs, BizTech, and Keyrus — validating our niche. No data exists to justify an ADJUST or NEW decision.

decision_history.rationale: Strategy launched 2026-03-22 — only 2 days old, well within the 5-day minimum evaluation window. GA4 property ID error persists (numeric ID required), GSC shows zero indexed pages (URL inspection confirms 'unknown to Google, never crawled'), and Bing query/page stats return no data yet — all consistent with a brand-new site. Bing crawl stats show healthy ramp-up (0 to 5 pages crawled, only 1 crawl error across 10 days) confirming Bing's bot is discovering the site. No performance data exists to justify ADJUST or NEW.

decision_history.rationale: Strategy is only 2 days old (launched 2026-03-22), well within the 5-day minimum evaluation window. GA4 returns a 403 permissions error (numeric property ID still not configured), GSC shows zero indexed pages across all query types, and both Bing query and page stats return no data — all consistent with a brand-new site. Bing crawl stats confirm healthy bot activity (ramp from 0 to 5 pages/day, isolated 1-error day with no recurrence). No performance data exists to justify ADJUST or NEW; KEEP is the only defensible call.
